```python
    72: # =====================================================================
    73: # FIXED: Replay Buffer
    74: # =====================================================================
    75: class SimpleReplayBuffer:
    76:     """Numpy-based replay buffer for continuous actions."""
    77: 
    78:     def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_size=int(1e6)):
    79:         self.max_size = max_size
    80:         self.ptr = 0
    81:         self.size = 0
    82:         self.obs = np.zeros((max_size, obs_dim), dtype=np.float32)
    83:         self.next_obs = np.zeros((max_size, obs_dim), dtype=np.float32)
    84:         self.actions = np.zeros((max_size, action_dim), dtype=np.float32)
    85:         self.rewards = np.zeros((max_size,), dtype=np.float32)
    86:         self.dones = np.zeros((max_size,), dtype=np.float32)
    87: 
    88:     def add(self, obs, next_obs, action, reward, done):
    89:         self.obs[self.ptr] = obs
    90:         self.next_obs[self.ptr] = next_obs
    91:         self.actions[self.ptr] = action
    92:         self.rewards[self.ptr] = reward
    93:         self.dones[self.ptr] = done
    94:         self.ptr = (self.ptr + 1) % self.max_size
    95:         self.size = min(self.size + 1, self.max_size)
    96: 
    97:     def sample(self, batch_size, device):
    98:         idx = np.random.randint(0, self.size, size=batch_size)
    99:         return (
   100:             torch.tensor(self.obs[idx], device=device),
   101:             torch.tensor(self.next_obs[idx], device=device),
   102:             torch.tensor(self.actions[idx], device=device),
   103:             torch.tensor(self.rewards[idx], device=device),
   104:             torch.tensor(self.dones[idx], device=device),
   105:         )
   106: 
   107: 
   108: # =====================================================================
   109: # FIXED: Utilities
   110: # =====================================================================
   111: def soft_update(target, source, tau):
   112:     for tp, sp in zip(target.parameters(), source.parameters()):
   113:         tp.data.copy_((1 - tau) * tp.data + tau * sp.data)
   114: 
   115: 
   116: def _mlp_factory(input_dim, output_dim, hidden=256):
   117:     """Build a 2-hidden-layer MLP. Use this as a building block for actors/critics."""
   118:     return nn.Sequential(
   119:         nn.Linear(input_dim, hidden),
   120:         nn.ReLU(),
   121:         nn.Linear(hidden, hidden),
   122:         nn.ReLU(),
   123:         nn.Linear(hidden, output_dim),
   124:     )
   125: 
   126: 
   127: @torch.no_grad()
   128: def eval_actor(env_id, actor, device, n_episodes, seed):
   129:     """Evaluate actor for n_episodes in a fresh env; returns array of episode rewards."""
   130:     eval_env = gym.make(env_id)
   131:     episode_rewards = []
   132:     for ep in range(n_episodes):
   133:         obs, _ = eval_env.reset(seed=seed + ep)
   134:         done = False
   135:         episode_reward = 0.0
   136:         while not done:
   137:             obs_t = torch.tensor(obs.reshape(1, -1), device=device, dtype=torch.float32)
   138:             action = actor.get_action(obs_t)
   139:             if isinstance(action, tuple):
   140:                 action = action[0]
   141:             action = action.cpu().numpy().flatten()
   142:             obs, reward, terminated, truncated, _ = eval_env.step(action)
   143:             done = terminated or truncated
   144:             episode_reward += reward
   145:         episode_rewards.append(episode_reward)
   146:     eval_env.close()
   147:     return np.asarray(episode_rewards)
   148: 
   149: 
   150: # =====================================================================
   151: # EDITABLE: Network definitions and OffPolicyAlgorithm
   152: # =====================================================================
   153: class Actor(nn.Module):
   154:     """Actor network. Must implement forward(obs) and get_action(obs).
   155: 
   156:     forward(obs) -> action tensor (used for training).
   157:     get_action(obs) -> action tensor (used for evaluation, no grad).
   158:     """
   159: 
   160:     def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_action):
   161:         super().__init__()
   162:         self.max_action = max_action
   163:         self.fc1 = nn.Linear(obs_dim, 256)
   164:         self.fc2 = nn.Linear(256, 256)
   165:         self.fc_mu = nn.Linear(256, action_dim)
   166:         self.register_buffer("action_scale", torch.tensor(max_action, dtype=torch.float32))
   167: 
   168:     def forward(self, obs):
   169:         x = F.relu(self.fc1(obs))
   170:         x = F.relu(self.fc2(x))
   171:         return torch.tanh(self.fc_mu(x)) * self.action_scale
   172: 
   173:     @torch.no_grad()
   174:     def get_action(self, obs):
   175:         return self.forward(obs)
   176: 
   177: 
   178: class QNetwork(nn.Module):
   179:     """Q-function Q(s, a) -> scalar."""
   180: 
   181:     def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim):
   182:         super().__init__()
   183:         self.fc1 = nn.Linear(obs_dim + action_dim, 256)
   184:         self.fc2 = nn.Linear(256, 256)
   185:         self.fc3 = nn.Linear(256, 1)
   186: 
   187:     def forward(self, obs, action):
   188:         x = torch.cat([obs, action], dim=-1)
   189:         x = F.relu(self.fc1(x))
   190:         x = F.relu(self.fc2(x))
   191:         return self.fc3(x)
   192: 
   193: 
   194: class OffPolicyAlgorithm:
   195:     """DDPG — Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient."""
   196: 
   197:     def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_action, device, args):
   198:         self.device = device
   199:         self.max_action = max_action
   200:         self.gamma = args.gamma
   201:         self.tau = args.tau
   202:         self.exploration_noise = args.exploration_noise
   203:         self.policy_frequency = args.policy_frequency
   204:         self.total_it = 0
   205: 
   206:         self.actor = Actor(obs_dim, action_dim, max_action).to(device)
   207:         self.target_actor = Actor(obs_dim, action_dim, max_action).to(device)
   208:         self.target_actor.load_state_dict(self.actor.state_dict())
   209: 
   210:         self.qf1 = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
   211:         self.qf1_target = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
   212:         self.qf1_target.load_state_dict(self.qf1.state_dict())
   213: 
   214:         self.actor_optimizer = optim.Adam(self.actor.parameters(), lr=args.learning_rate)
   215:         self.q_optimizer = optim.Adam(self.qf1.parameters(), lr=args.learning_rate)
   216: 
   217:     def select_action(self, obs):
   218:         obs_t = torch.tensor(obs.reshape(1, -1), device=self.device, dtype=torch.float32)
   219:         with torch.no_grad():
   220:             action = self.actor(obs_t).cpu().numpy().flatten()
   221:         noise = np.random.normal(0, self.max_action * self.exploration_noise, size=action.shape)
   222:         return np.clip(action + noise, -self.max_action, self.max_action)
   223: 
   224:     def update(self, batch):
   225:         self.total_it += 1
   226:         obs, next_obs, actions, rewards, dones = batch
   227: 
   228:         with torch.no_grad():
   229:             next_actions = self.target_actor(next_obs)
   230:             target_q = self.qf1_target(next_obs, next_actions).view(-1)
   231:             td_target = rewards + (1 - dones) * self.gamma * target_q
   232: 
   233:         current_q = self.qf1(obs, actions).view(-1)
   234:         critic_loss = F.mse_loss(current_q, td_target)
   235: 
   236:         self.q_optimizer.zero_grad()
   237:         critic_loss.backward()
   238:         self.q_optimizer.step()
   239: 
   240:         actor_loss_val = 0.0
   241:         if self.total_it % self.policy_frequency == 0:
   242:             actor_loss = -self.qf1(obs, self.actor(obs)).mean()
   243:             self.actor_optimizer.zero_grad()
   244:             actor_loss.backward()
   245:             self.actor_optimizer.step()
   246:             actor_loss_val = actor_loss.item()
   247: 
   248:             soft_update(self.target_actor, self.actor, self.tau)
   249:             soft_update(self.qf1_target, self.qf1, self.tau)
   250: 
   251:         return {"critic_loss": critic_loss.item(), "actor_loss": actor_loss_val}
   252: 
   253: 
   254: # =====================================================================
   255: # FIXED: Training loop
   256: # =====================================================================
   257: if __name__ == "__main__":
   258:     args = tyro.cli(Args)
   259:     run_name = f"{args.env_id}__{args.exp_name}__{args.seed}__{int(time.time())}"
   260: 
   261:     # Seeding
   262:     random.seed(args.seed)
   263:     np.random.seed(args.seed)
   264:     torch.manual_seed(args.seed)
   265:     torch.backends.cudnn.deterministic = args.torch_deterministic
   266: 
   267:     device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() and args.cuda else "cpu")
   268: 
   269:     # Environment setup
   270:     envs = gym.vector.SyncVectorEnv([make_env(args.env_id, args.seed)])
   271:     assert isinstance(envs.single_action_space, gym.spaces.Box), "only continuous action space is supported"
   272: 
   273:     obs_dim = np.array(envs.single_observation_space.shape).prod()
   274:     action_dim = np.prod(envs.single_action_space.shape)
   275:     max_action = float(envs.single_action_space.high[0])
   276: 
   277:     # Algorithm
   278:     algorithm = OffPolicyAlgorithm(obs_dim, action_dim, max_action, device, args)
   279: 
   280:     # Replay buffer
   281:     rb = SimpleReplayBuffer(obs_dim, action_dim, args.buffer_size)
   282: 
   283:     start_time = time.time()
   284:     obs, _ = envs.reset(seed=args.seed)
   285: 
   286:     for global_step in range(args.total_timesteps):
   287:         # Action selection
   288:         if global_step < args.learning_starts:
   289:             actions = np.array([envs.single_action_space.sample()])
   290:         else:
   291:             actions = algorithm.select_action(obs[0]).reshape(1, -1)
   292: 
   293:         # Environment step
   294:         next_obs, rewards, terminations, truncations, infos = envs.step(actions)
   295: 
   296:         if "final_info" in infos:
   297:             for info in infos["final_info"]:
   298:                 if info is not None:
   299:                     print(f"global_step={global_step}, episodic_return={info['episode']['r']}")
   300:                     break
   301: 
   302:         # Handle truncation
   303:         real_next_obs = next_obs.copy()
   304:         for idx, trunc in enumerate(truncations):
   305:             if trunc:
   306:                 real_next_obs[idx] = infos["final_observation"][idx]
   307: 
   308:         rb.add(obs[0], real_next_obs[0], actions[0], rewards[0], terminations[0])
   309:         obs = next_obs
   310: 
   311:         # Training
   312:         if global_step > args.learning_starts:
   313:             batch = rb.sample(args.batch_size, device)
   314:             log_dict = algorithm.update(batch)
   315: 
   316:             if global_step % 1000 == 0:
   317:                 metrics_str = " ".join(
   318:                     f"{k}={v:.4f}" if isinstance(v, float) else f"{k}={v}"
   319:                     for k, v in log_dict.items()
   320:                 )
   321:                 print(f"TRAIN_METRICS step={global_step} {metrics_str}", flush=True)
   322: 
   323:         # Evaluation
   324:         if (global_step + 1) % args.eval_freq == 0:
   325:             eval_returns = eval_actor(
   326:                 args.env_id, algorithm.actor, device,
   327:                 n_episodes=args.eval_episodes, seed=args.seed + 1000,
   328:             )
   329:             mean_return = eval_returns.mean()
   330:             print(f"Eval episodic_return: {mean_return:.2f}", flush=True)
   331: 
   332:     envs.close()
```

```python
   153: class Actor(nn.Module):

   178: class QNetwork(nn.Module):
   179:     """Q-function Q(s, a) -> scalar."""
   180: 
   181:     def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim):
   182:         super().__init__()
   183:         self.fc1 = nn.Linear(obs_dim + action_dim, 256)
   184:         self.fc2 = nn.Linear(256, 256)
   185:         self.fc3 = nn.Linear(256, 1)

   187:     def forward(self, obs, action):

   189:         x = F.relu(self.fc1(x))
   190:         x = F.relu(self.fc2(x))
   191:         return self.fc3(x)

   194: class OffPolicyAlgorithm:
   195:     """TD3 — Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient."""
   196: 
   197:     def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_action, device, args):
   198:         self.device = device
   199:         self.max_action = max_action
   200:         self.gamma = args.gamma
   201:         self.tau = args.tau
   202:         self.exploration_noise = args.exploration_noise
   203:         self.policy_frequency = args.policy_frequency
   204:         self.policy_noise = 0.2
   205:         self.noise_clip = 0.5
   206:         self.total_it = 0
   207: 
   208:         self.actor = Actor(obs_dim, action_dim, max_action).to(device)
   209:         self.target_actor = Actor(obs_dim, action_dim, max_action).to(device)
   210:         self.target_actor.load_state_dict(self.actor.state_dict())
   211: 
   212:         self.qf1 = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
   213:         self.qf2 = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
   214:         self.qf1_target = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
   215:         self.qf2_target = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
   216:         self.qf1_target.load_state_dict(self.qf1.state_dict())
   217:         self.qf2_target.load_state_dict(self.qf2.state_dict())
   218: 
   219:         self.actor_optimizer = optim.Adam(self.actor.parameters(), lr=args.learning_rate)
   220:         self.q_optimizer = optim.Adam(
   221:             list(self.qf1.parameters()) + list(self.qf2.parameters()),
   222:             lr=args.learning_rate,
   223:         )
   224: 
   225:     def select_action(self, obs):
   226:         obs_t = torch.tensor(obs.reshape(1, -1), device=self.device, dtype=torch.float32)
   227:         with torch.no_grad():
   228:             action = self.actor(obs_t).cpu().numpy().flatten()
   229:         noise = np.random.normal(0, self.max_action * self.exploration_noise, size=action.shape)
   230:         return np.clip(action + noise, -self.max_action, self.max_action)
   231: 
   232:     def update(self, batch):
   233:         self.total_it += 1
   234:         obs, next_obs, actions, rewards, dones = batch
   235: 
   236:         with torch.no_grad():
   237:             noise = (torch.randn_like(actions) * self.policy_noise).clamp(
   238:                 -self.noise_clip, self.noise_clip
   239:             ) * self.max_action
   240:             next_actions = (self.target_actor(next_obs) + noise).clamp(
   241:                 -self.max_action, self.max_action
   242:             )
   243:             target_q1 = self.qf1_target(next_obs, next_actions).view(-1)
   244:             target_q2 = self.qf2_target(next_obs, next_actions).view(-1)
   245:             td_target = rewards + (1 - dones) * self.gamma * torch.min(target_q1, target_q2)

   247:         q1 = self.qf1(obs, actions).view(-1)
   248:         q2 = self.qf2(obs, actions).view(-1)
   249:         critic_loss = F.mse_loss(q1, td_target) + F.mse_loss(q2, td_target)

   252:         critic_loss.backward()
   253:         self.q_optimizer.step()

   260:             self.actor_optimizer.step()
   261:             actor_loss_val = actor_loss.item()
   262: 
   263:             soft_update(self.target_actor, self.actor, self.tau)
   264:             soft_update(self.qf1_target, self.qf1, self.tau)
   265:             soft_update(self.qf2_target, self.qf2, self.tau)
```

# Task: rl-offpolicy-continuous

# Online RL: Off-Policy Actor-Critic for Continuous Control


## Objective
Design and implement an off-policy actor-critic RL algorithm for continuous control. Your code goes in `custom_offpolicy_continuous.py`. Three reference implementations (DDPG, TD3, SAC) are provided as read-only.

## Background
Off-policy methods maintain a replay buffer of past experience and update the policy using data collected under previous policies. Key challenges include overestimation bias in Q-value estimates, exploration-exploitation tradeoff, and sample efficiency. Different approaches address these through twin critics, entropy regularization, target smoothing, or delayed updates.

## Constraints
- Network architecture dimensions are FIXED and cannot be modified
- Total parameter count is enforced at runtime
- Focus on algorithmic innovation: new loss functions, update rules, exploration strategies, etc.
- Do NOT simply copy a reference implementation with minor changes

## Evaluation
Trained and evaluated on HalfCheetah-v4, Hopper-v4, Walker2d-v4. Additional held-out environments (not shown during intermediate testing) are used to assess generalization. Metric: mean episodic return over 10 evaluation episodes (higher is better).

```python
    75: class SimpleReplayBuffer:
    76:     """Numpy-based replay buffer for continuous actions."""
    77: 
    78:     def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_size=int(1e6)):
    79:         self.max_size = max_size
    80:         self.ptr = 0
    81:         self.size = 0
    82:         self.obs = np.zeros((max_size, obs_dim), dtype=np.float32)
    83:         self.next_obs = np.zeros((max_size, obs_dim), dtype=np.float32)
    84:         self.actions = np.zeros((max_size, action_dim), dtype=np.float32)
    85:         self.rewards = np.zeros((max_size,), dtype=np.float32)
    86:         self.dones = np.zeros((max_size,), dtype=np.float32)
    87: 
    88:     def add(self, obs, next_obs, action, reward, done):
    89:         self.obs[self.ptr] = obs
    90:         self.next_obs[self.ptr] = next_obs
    91:         self.actions[self.ptr] = action
    92:         self.rewards[self.ptr] = reward
    93:         self.dones[self.ptr] = done
    94:         self.ptr = (self.ptr + 1) % self.max_size
    95:         self.size = min(self.size + 1, self.max_size)
    96: 
    97:     def sample(self, batch_size, device):
    98:         idx = np.random.randint(0, self.size, size=batch_size)
    99:         return (
   100:             torch.tensor(self.obs[idx], device=device),
   101:             torch.tensor(self.next_obs[idx], device=device),
   102:             torch.tensor(self.actions[idx], device=device),
   103:             torch.tensor(self.rewards[idx], device=device),
   104:             torch.tensor(self.dones[idx], device=device),
   105:         )
   106: 
   107: 
   108: # =====================================================================
   109: # FIXED: Utilities
   110: # =====================================================================
   111: def soft_update(target, source, tau):
   112:     for tp, sp in zip(target.parameters(), source.parameters()):
   113:         tp.data.copy_((1 - tau) * tp.data + tau * sp.data)
   114: 
   115: 
   116: def _mlp_factory(input_dim, output_dim, hidden=256):
   117:     """Build a 2-hidden-layer MLP. Use this as a building block for actors/critics."""
   118:     return nn.Sequential(
   119:         nn.Linear(input_dim, hidden),
   120:         nn.ReLU(),
   121:         nn.Linear(hidden, hidden),
   122:         nn.ReLU(),
   123:         nn.Linear(hidden, output_dim),
   124:     )
   125: 
   126: 
   127: @torch.no_grad()
   128: def eval_actor(env_id, actor, device, n_episodes, seed):
   129:     """Evaluate actor for n_episodes in a fresh env; returns array of episode rewards."""
   130:     eval_env = gym.make(env_id)
   131:     episode_rewards = []
   132:     for ep in range(n_episodes):
   133:         obs, _ = eval_env.reset(seed=seed + ep)
   134:         done = False
   135:         episode_reward = 0.0
   136:         while not done:
   137:             obs_t = torch.tensor(obs.reshape(1, -1), device=device, dtype=torch.float32)
   138:             action = actor.get_action(obs_t)
   139:             if isinstance(action, tuple):
   140:                 action = action[0]
   141:             action = action.cpu().numpy().flatten()
   142:             obs, reward, terminated, truncated, _ = eval_env.step(action)
   143:             done = terminated or truncated
   144:             episode_reward += reward
   145:         episode_rewards.append(episode_reward)
   146:     eval_env.close()
   147:     return np.asarray(episode_rewards)
   148: 
   149: 
   150: # =====================================================================
   151: # EDITABLE: Network definitions and OffPolicyAlgorithm
   152: # =====================================================================
   153: class Actor(nn.Module):
   154:     """Actor network. Must implement forward(obs) and get_action(obs).
   155: 
   156:     forward(obs) -> action tensor (used for training).
   157:     get_action(obs) -> action tensor (used for evaluation, no grad).
   158:     """
   159: 
   160:     def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_action):
   161:         super().__init__()
   162:         self.max_action = max_action
   163:         self.fc1 = nn.Linear(obs_dim, 256)
   164:         self.fc2 = nn.Linear(256, 256)
   165:         self.fc_mu = nn.Linear(256, action_dim)
   166:         self.register_buffer("action_scale", torch.tensor(max_action, dtype=torch.float32))
   167: 
   168:     def forward(self, obs):
   169:         x = F.relu(self.fc1(obs))
   170:         x = F.relu(self.fc2(x))
   171:         return torch.tanh(self.fc_mu(x)) * self.action_scale
   172: 
   173:     @torch.no_grad()
   174:     def get_action(self, obs):
   175:         return self.forward(obs)
   176: 
   177: 
   178: class QNetwork(nn.Module):
   179:     """Q-function Q(s, a) -> scalar."""
   180: 
   181:     def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim):
   182:         super().__init__()
   183:         self.fc1 = nn.Linear(obs_dim + action_dim, 256)
   184:         self.fc2 = nn.Linear(256, 256)
   185:         self.fc3 = nn.Linear(256, 1)
   186: 
   187:     def forward(self, obs, action):
   188:         x = torch.cat([obs, action], dim=-1)
   189:         x = F.relu(self.fc1(x))
   190:         x = F.relu(self.fc2(x))
   191:         return self.fc3(x)
   192: 
   193: 
   194: class OffPolicyAlgorithm:
   195:     """DDPG — Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient."""
   196: 
   197:     def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_action, device, args):
   198:         self.device = device
   199:         self.max_action = max_action
   200:         self.gamma = args.gamma
   201:         self.tau = args.tau
   202:         self.exploration_noise = args.exploration_noise
   203:         self.policy_frequency = args.policy_frequency
   204:         self.total_it = 0
   205: 
   206:         self.actor = Actor(obs_dim, action_dim, max_action).to(device)
   207:         self.target_actor = Actor(obs_dim, action_dim, max_action).to(device)
   208:         self.target_actor.load_state_dict(self.actor.state_dict())
   209: 
   210:         self.qf1 = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
   211:         self.qf1_target = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
   212:         self.qf1_target.load_state_dict(self.qf1.state_dict())
   213: 
   214:         self.actor_optimizer = optim.Adam(self.actor.parameters(), lr=args.learning_rate)
   215:         self.q_optimizer = optim.Adam(self.qf1.parameters(), lr=args.learning_rate)
   216: 
   217:     def select_action(self, obs):
   218:         obs_t = torch.tensor(obs.reshape(1, -1), device=self.device, dtype=torch.float32)
   219:         with torch.no_grad():
   220:             action = self.actor(obs_t).cpu().numpy().flatten()
   221:         noise = np.random.normal(0, self.max_action * self.exploration_noise, size=action.shape)
   222:         return np.clip(action + noise, -self.max_action, self.max_action)
   223: 
   224:     def update(self, batch):
   225:         self.total_it += 1
   226:         obs, next_obs, actions, rewards, dones = batch
   227: 
   228:         with torch.no_grad():
   229:             next_actions = self.target_actor(next_obs)
   230:             target_q = self.qf1_target(next_obs, next_actions).view(-1)
   231:             td_target = rewards + (1 - dones) * self.gamma * target_q
   232: 
   233:         current_q = self.qf1(obs, actions).view(-1)
   234:         critic_loss = F.mse_loss(current_q, td_target)
   235: 
   236:         self.q_optimizer.zero_grad()
   237:         critic_loss.backward()
   238:         self.q_optimizer.step()
   239: 
   240:         actor_loss_val = 0.0
   241:         if self.total_it % self.policy_frequency == 0:
   242:             actor_loss = -self.qf1(obs, self.actor(obs)).mean()
   243:             self.actor_optimizer.zero_grad()
   244:             actor_loss.backward()
   245:             self.actor_optimizer.step()
   246:             actor_loss_val = actor_loss.item()
   247: 
   248:             soft_update(self.target_actor, self.actor, self.tau)
   249:             soft_update(self.qf1_target, self.qf1, self.tau)
   250: 
   251:         return {"critic_loss": critic_loss.item(), "actor_loss": actor_loss_val}
   252: 
   253: 
   254: # =====================================================================
   255: # FIXED: Training loop
   256: # =====================================================================
   257: if __name__ == "__main__":
   258:     args = tyro.cli(Args)
   259:     run_name = f"{args.env_id}__{args.exp_name}__{args.seed}__{int(time.time())}"
   260: 
   261:     # Seeding
   262:     random.seed(args.seed)
   263:     np.random.seed(args.seed)
   264:     torch.manual_seed(args.seed)
   265:     torch.backends.cudnn.deterministic = args.torch_deterministic
   266: 
   267:     device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() and args.cuda else "cpu")
   268: 
   269:     # Environment setup
   270:     envs = gym.vector.SyncVectorEnv([make_env(args.env_id, args.seed)])
   271:     assert isinstance(envs.single_action_space, gym.spaces.Box), "only continuous action space is supported"
   272: 
   273:     obs_dim = np.array(envs.single_observation_space.shape).prod()
   274:     action_dim = np.prod(envs.single_action_space.shape)
   275:     max_action = float(envs.single_action_space.high[0])
   276: 
   277:     # Algorithm
   278:     algorithm = OffPolicyAlgorithm(obs_dim, action_dim, max_action, device, args)
   279: 
   280:     # Replay buffer
   281:     rb = SimpleReplayBuffer(obs_dim, action_dim, args.buffer_size)
   282: 
   283:     start_time = time.time()
   284:     obs, _ = envs.reset(seed=args.seed)
   285: 
   286:     for global_step in range(args.total_timesteps):
   287:         # Action selection
   288:         if global_step < args.learning_starts:
   289:             actions = np.array([envs.single_action_space.sample()])
   290:         else:
   291:             actions = algorithm.select_action(obs[0]).reshape(1, -1)
   292: 
   293:         # Environment step
   294:         next_obs, rewards, terminations, truncations, infos = envs.step(actions)
   295: 
   296:         if "final_info" in infos:
   297:             for info in infos["final_info"]:
   298:                 if info is not None:
   299:                     print(f"global_step={global_step}, episodic_return={info['episode']['r']}")
   300:                     break
   301: 
   302:         # Handle truncation
   303:         real_next_obs = next_obs.copy()
   304:         for idx, trunc in enumerate(truncations):
   305:             if trunc:
   306:                 real_next_obs[idx] = infos["final_observation"][idx]
   307: 
   308:         rb.add(obs[0], real_next_obs[0], actions[0], rewards[0], terminations[0])
   309:         obs = next_obs
   310: 
   311:         # Training
   312:         if global_step > args.learning_starts:
   313:             batch = rb.sample(args.batch_size, device)
   314:             log_dict = algorithm.update(batch)
   315: 
   316:             if global_step % 1000 == 0:
   317:                 metrics_str = " ".join(
   318:                     f"{k}={v:.4f}" if isinstance(v, float) else f"{k}={v}"
   319:                     for k, v in log_dict.items()
   320:                 )
   321:                 print(f"TRAIN_METRICS step={global_step} {metrics_str}", flush=True)
   322: 
   323:         # Evaluation
   324:         if (global_step + 1) % args.eval_freq == 0:
   325:             eval_returns = eval_actor(
   326:                 args.env_id, algorithm.actor, device,
   327:                 n_episodes=args.eval_episodes, seed=args.seed + 1000,
   328:             )
   329:             mean_return = eval_returns.mean()
   330:             print(f"Eval episodic_return: {mean_return:.2f}", flush=True)
   331: 
   332:     envs.close()
```

LOG_STD_MAX = 2.0
LOG_STD_MIN = -5.0


def _init_linear(layer, gain=np.sqrt(2.0), bias=0.0):
    nn.init.orthogonal_(layer.weight, gain)
    nn.init.constant_(layer.bias, bias)
    return layer


class Actor(nn.Module):
    """Stochastic tanh-Gaussian actor with deterministic eval actions."""

    def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_action):
        super().__init__()
        self.fc1 = _init_linear(nn.Linear(obs_dim, 256))
        self.fc2 = _init_linear(nn.Linear(256, 256))
        self.fc_mean = _init_linear(nn.Linear(256, action_dim), gain=1e-2)
        self.fc_logstd = _init_linear(nn.Linear(256, action_dim), gain=1e-2, bias=-1.0)
        self.register_buffer("action_scale", torch.tensor(max_action, dtype=torch.float32))

    def _dist_params(self, obs):
        x = F.relu(self.fc1(obs))
        x = F.relu(self.fc2(x))
        mean = self.fc_mean(x)
        log_std = torch.tanh(self.fc_logstd(x))
        log_std = LOG_STD_MIN + 0.5 * (LOG_STD_MAX - LOG_STD_MIN) * (log_std + 1.0)
        return mean, log_std

    def forward(self, obs):
        mean, _ = self._dist_params(obs)
        return torch.tanh(mean) * self.action_scale

    def sample(self, obs):
        mean, log_std = self._dist_params(obs)
        std = log_std.exp()
        normal = torch.distributions.Normal(mean, std)
        x_t = normal.rsample()
        y_t = torch.tanh(x_t)
        action = y_t * self.action_scale
        log_prob = normal.log_prob(x_t)
        log_prob -= torch.log(self.action_scale * (1.0 - y_t.pow(2)) + 1e-6)
        log_prob = log_prob.sum(dim=1, keepdim=True)
        mean_action = torch.tanh(mean) * self.action_scale
        return action, log_prob, mean_action

    @torch.no_grad()
    def get_action(self, obs):
        return self.forward(obs)


class QNetwork(nn.Module):
    """Q-function Q(s, a) -> scalar."""

    def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim):
        super().__init__()
        self.fc1 = _init_linear(nn.Linear(obs_dim + action_dim, 256))
        self.fc2 = _init_linear(nn.Linear(256, 256))
        self.fc3 = _init_linear(nn.Linear(256, 1), gain=1e-2)

    def forward(self, obs, action):
        x = torch.cat([obs, action], dim=-1)
        x = F.relu(self.fc1(x))
        x = F.relu(self.fc2(x))
        return self.fc3(x)


class OffPolicyAlgorithm:
    """Engineered SAC implementation tuned for continuous control."""

    def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_action, device, args):
        self.device = device
        self.max_action = max_action
        self.gamma = args.gamma
        self.tau = args.tau
        self.policy_frequency = 1
        self.grad_clip = 10.0
        self.total_it = 0

        self.actor = Actor(obs_dim, action_dim, max_action).to(device)
        self.qf1 = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf2 = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf1_target = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf2_target = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf1_target.load_state_dict(self.qf1.state_dict())
        self.qf2_target.load_state_dict(self.qf2.state_dict())

        self.actor_optimizer = optim.Adam(self.actor.parameters(), lr=args.learning_rate, eps=1e-5)
        self.q_optimizer = optim.Adam(
            list(self.qf1.parameters()) + list(self.qf2.parameters()),
            lr=args.learning_rate,
            eps=1e-5,
        )

        self.target_entropy = -0.75 * action_dim
        self.log_alpha = torch.tensor(np.log(0.1), device=device, requires_grad=True)
        self.alpha_optimizer = optim.Adam([self.log_alpha], lr=args.learning_rate, eps=1e-5)
        self.alpha = float(self.log_alpha.exp().item())

    def select_action(self, obs):
        obs_t = torch.tensor(obs.reshape(1, -1), device=self.device, dtype=torch.float32)
        with torch.no_grad():
            action, _, _ = self.actor.sample(obs_t)
        return action.cpu().numpy().flatten()

    def update(self, batch):
        self.total_it += 1
        obs, next_obs, actions, rewards, dones = batch
        rewards = rewards.view(-1)
        dones = dones.view(-1)

        alpha = self.log_alpha.exp().clamp(1e-4, 10.0)
        with torch.no_grad():
            next_actions, next_log_pi, _ = self.actor.sample(next_obs)
            q1_next = self.qf1_target(next_obs, next_actions).view(-1)
            q2_next = self.qf2_target(next_obs, next_actions).view(-1)
            min_q_next = torch.min(q1_next, q2_next) - alpha * next_log_pi.view(-1)
            td_target = rewards + (1.0 - dones) * self.gamma * min_q_next

        q1 = self.qf1(obs, actions).view(-1)
        q2 = self.qf2(obs, actions).view(-1)
        critic_loss = F.mse_loss(q1, td_target) + F.mse_loss(q2, td_target)

        self.q_optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
        critic_loss.backward()
        torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(
            list(self.qf1.parameters()) + list(self.qf2.parameters()), self.grad_clip
        )
        self.q_optimizer.step()

        actor_loss_val = 0.0
        alpha_loss_val = 0.0
        if self.total_it % self.policy_frequency == 0:
            pi, log_pi, _ = self.actor.sample(obs)
            q1_pi = self.qf1(obs, pi).view(-1)
            q2_pi = self.qf2(obs, pi).view(-1)
            actor_loss = (alpha.detach() * log_pi.view(-1) - torch.min(q1_pi, q2_pi)).mean()

            self.actor_optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
            actor_loss.backward()
            torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(self.actor.parameters(), self.grad_clip)
            self.actor_optimizer.step()
            actor_loss_val = actor_loss.item()

            alpha_loss = -(self.log_alpha.exp() * (log_pi.view(-1).detach() + self.target_entropy)).mean()
            self.alpha_optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
            alpha_loss.backward()
            self.alpha_optimizer.step()
            self.alpha = float(self.log_alpha.exp().clamp(1e-4, 10.0).item())
            alpha_loss_val = alpha_loss.item()

        soft_update(self.qf1_target, self.qf1, self.tau)
        soft_update(self.qf2_target, self.qf2, self.tau)

        return {
            "critic_loss": critic_loss.item(),
            "actor_loss": actor_loss_val,
            "alpha": self.alpha,
            "alpha_loss": alpha_loss_val,
        }

   299              alpha_loss.backward()
   300              self.alpha_optimizer.step()
   301              self.alpha = float(self.log_alpha.exp().clamp(1e-4, 10.0).item())
   302              alpha_loss_val = alpha_loss.item()
   303  
   304          soft_update(self.qf1_target, self.qf1, self.tau)
   305          soft_update(self.qf2_target, self.qf2, self.tau)
   306  
   307          return {
   308              "critic_loss": critic_loss.item(),
   309              "actor_loss": actor_loss_val,
   310              "alpha": self.alpha,
   311              "alpha_loss": alpha_loss_val,
   312          }

   314| 
   315| # =====================================================================

class Actor(nn.Module):
    """Deterministic actor used by a lower-confidence, self-anchored TD3 variant."""

    def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_action):
        super().__init__()
        self.net = _mlp_factory(obs_dim, action_dim)
        self.register_buffer("action_scale", torch.tensor(max_action, dtype=torch.float32))

    def forward(self, obs):
        return torch.tanh(self.net(obs)) * self.action_scale

    @torch.no_grad()
    def get_action(self, obs):
        return self.forward(obs)


class QNetwork(nn.Module):
    """Q-function Q(s, a) -> scalar."""

    def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim):
        super().__init__()
        self.net = _mlp_factory(obs_dim + action_dim, 1)

    def forward(self, obs, action):
        return self.net(torch.cat([obs, action], dim=-1))


class OffPolicyAlgorithm:
    """Lower-Confidence Self-Anchored TD3.

    Novel ingredients beyond vanilla TD3:
    1) lower-confidence actor/value optimization via critic disagreement penalties;
    2) self-anchored advantage-weighted behavior regularization, where the actor only
       imitates replay actions when they score better than the current policy action;
    3) disagreement-adaptive exploration noise.
    """

    def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_action, device, args):
        self.device = device
        self.max_action = max_action
        self.gamma = args.gamma
        self.tau = args.tau
        self.exploration_noise = args.exploration_noise
        self.policy_frequency = args.policy_frequency
        self.policy_noise = 0.2
        self.noise_clip = 0.5
        self.actor_bc_alpha = 2.5
        self.actor_lcb_scale = 0.25
        self.target_lcb_scale = 0.10
        self.consistency_coef = 0.05
        self.disagreement_ema = 1.0
        self.total_it = 0

        self.actor = Actor(obs_dim, action_dim, max_action).to(device)
        self.target_actor = Actor(obs_dim, action_dim, max_action).to(device)
        self.target_actor.load_state_dict(self.actor.state_dict())

        self.qf1 = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf2 = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf1_target = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf2_target = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf1_target.load_state_dict(self.qf1.state_dict())
        self.qf2_target.load_state_dict(self.qf2.state_dict())

        self.actor_optimizer = optim.Adam(self.actor.parameters(), lr=args.learning_rate)
        self.q_optimizer = optim.Adam(
            list(self.qf1.parameters()) + list(self.qf2.parameters()), lr=args.learning_rate
        )

    def select_action(self, obs):
        """Exploration scales up mildly in states where the critics disagree more."""
        obs_t = torch.tensor(obs.reshape(1, -1), device=self.device, dtype=torch.float32)
        with torch.no_grad():
            action_t = self.actor(obs_t)
            q_gap = (self.qf1(obs_t, action_t) - self.qf2(obs_t, action_t)).abs().item()
            noise_mult = 1.0 + 0.5 * np.tanh(q_gap / (self.disagreement_ema + 1e-6))
            action = action_t.cpu().numpy().flatten()
        noise = np.random.normal(
            0, self.max_action * self.exploration_noise * noise_mult, size=action.shape
        )
        return np.clip(action + noise, -self.max_action, self.max_action)

    def update(self, batch):
        """Single gradient update. Returns a dict of scalar metrics."""
        self.total_it += 1
        obs, next_obs, actions, rewards, dones = batch

        with torch.no_grad():
            noise = (torch.randn_like(actions) * self.policy_noise).clamp(
                -self.noise_clip, self.noise_clip
            ) * self.max_action
            next_actions = (self.target_actor(next_obs) + noise).clamp(-self.max_action, self.max_action)
            target_q1 = self.qf1_target(next_obs, next_actions).view(-1)
            target_q2 = self.qf2_target(next_obs, next_actions).view(-1)
            target_q = torch.min(target_q1, target_q2) - self.target_lcb_scale * (target_q1 - target_q2).abs()
            td_target = rewards + (1 - dones) * self.gamma * target_q

        q1 = self.qf1(obs, actions).view(-1)
        q2 = self.qf2(obs, actions).view(-1)
        critic_loss = (
            F.mse_loss(q1, td_target)
            + F.mse_loss(q2, td_target)
            + self.consistency_coef * (q1 - q2).pow(2).mean()
        )

        self.q_optimizer.zero_grad()
        critic_loss.backward()
        self.q_optimizer.step()
        self.disagreement_ema = 0.995 * self.disagreement_ema + 0.005 * (q1 - q2).abs().mean().item()

        actor_loss_val, bc_loss_val, q_gap_val = 0.0, 0.0, (q1 - q2).abs().mean().item()
        if self.total_it % self.policy_frequency == 0:
            pi = self.actor(obs)
            q1_pi = self.qf1(obs, pi).view(-1)
            q2_pi = self.qf2(obs, pi).view(-1)
            q_lcb = torch.min(q1_pi, q2_pi) - self.actor_lcb_scale * (q1_pi - q2_pi).abs()

            with torch.no_grad():
                q1_data = self.qf1(obs, actions).view(-1)
                q2_data = self.qf2(obs, actions).view(-1)
                q_data_lcb = torch.min(q1_data, q2_data) - self.actor_lcb_scale * (q1_data - q2_data).abs()
                adv = q_data_lcb - q_lcb.detach()
                adv = adv / (adv.abs().mean() + 1e-6)
                weights = torch.exp(torch.clamp(adv, min=0.0, max=4.0)) - 1.0

            bc_err = ((pi - actions) / self.max_action).pow(2).mean(dim=1)
            bc_loss = (weights * bc_err).sum() / (weights.sum() + 1e-6)
            q_coef = self.actor_bc_alpha / (q_lcb.abs().mean().detach() + 1e-6)
            actor_loss = bc_loss - q_coef * q_lcb.mean()

            self.actor_optimizer.zero_grad()
            actor_loss.backward()
            self.actor_optimizer.step()
            actor_loss_val = actor_loss.item()
            bc_loss_val = bc_loss.item()

            soft_update(self.target_actor, self.actor, self.tau)
            soft_update(self.qf1_target, self.qf1, self.tau)
            soft_update(self.qf2_target, self.qf2, self.tau)

        return {
            "critic_loss": critic_loss.item(),
            "actor_loss": actor_loss_val,
            "bc_loss": bc_loss_val,
            "q_gap": q_gap_val,
        }

LOG_STD_MAX = 2.0
LOG_STD_MIN = -5.0


def _init_linear(layer, gain=np.sqrt(2.0), bias=0.0):
    nn.init.orthogonal_(layer.weight, gain)
    nn.init.constant_(layer.bias, bias)
    return layer


class Actor(nn.Module):
    """Stochastic tanh-Gaussian actor with built-in observation normalization."""

    def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_action):
        super().__init__()
        self.fc1 = _init_linear(nn.Linear(obs_dim, 256))
        self.fc2 = _init_linear(nn.Linear(256, 256))
        self.fc_mean = _init_linear(nn.Linear(256, action_dim), gain=1e-2)
        self.fc_logstd = _init_linear(nn.Linear(256, action_dim), gain=1e-2)
        self.register_buffer("action_scale", torch.tensor(max_action, dtype=torch.float32))
        self.register_buffer("obs_mean", torch.zeros(obs_dim, dtype=torch.float32))
        self.register_buffer("obs_var", torch.ones(obs_dim, dtype=torch.float32))

    def _normalize_obs(self, obs):
        return ((obs - self.obs_mean) / torch.sqrt(self.obs_var + 1e-6)).clamp(-5.0, 5.0)

    def _dist_params(self, obs):
        obs = self._normalize_obs(obs)
        x = F.relu(self.fc1(obs))
        x = F.relu(self.fc2(x))
        mean = self.fc_mean(x)
        log_std = torch.tanh(self.fc_logstd(x))
        log_std = LOG_STD_MIN + 0.5 * (LOG_STD_MAX - LOG_STD_MIN) * (log_std + 1.0)
        return mean, log_std

    def forward(self, obs):
        mean, _ = self._dist_params(obs)
        return torch.tanh(mean) * self.action_scale

    def sample(self, obs):
        mean, log_std = self._dist_params(obs)
        std = log_std.exp()
        normal = torch.distributions.Normal(mean, std)
        x_t = normal.rsample()
        y_t = torch.tanh(x_t)
        action = y_t * self.action_scale
        log_prob = normal.log_prob(x_t)
        log_prob -= torch.log(self.action_scale * (1.0 - y_t.pow(2)) + 1e-6)
        log_prob = log_prob.sum(dim=1, keepdim=True)
        mean_action = torch.tanh(mean) * self.action_scale
        return action, log_prob, mean_action

    @torch.no_grad()
    def get_action(self, obs):
        return self.forward(obs)


class QNetwork(nn.Module):
    """Q-function Q(s, a) -> scalar with observation normalization."""

    def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim):
        super().__init__()
        self.fc1 = _init_linear(nn.Linear(obs_dim + action_dim, 256))
        self.fc2 = _init_linear(nn.Linear(256, 256))
        self.fc3 = _init_linear(nn.Linear(256, 1), gain=1.0)
        self.register_buffer("obs_mean", torch.zeros(obs_dim, dtype=torch.float32))
        self.register_buffer("obs_var", torch.ones(obs_dim, dtype=torch.float32))

    def _normalize_obs(self, obs):
        return ((obs - self.obs_mean) / torch.sqrt(self.obs_var + 1e-6)).clamp(-5.0, 5.0)

    def forward(self, obs, action):
        obs = self._normalize_obs(obs)
        x = torch.cat([obs, action], dim=-1)
        x = F.relu(self.fc1(x))
        x = F.relu(self.fc2(x))
        return self.fc3(x)


class OffPolicyAlgorithm:
    """Engineered SAC implementation tuned with normalization and stable optimization."""

    def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_action, device, args):
        self.device = device
        self.obs_dim = obs_dim
        self.action_dim = action_dim
        self.max_action = max_action
        self.gamma = args.gamma
        self.tau = args.tau
        self.policy_frequency = 2
        self.total_it = 0
        self.action_it = 0
        self.actor_grad_clip = 5.0
        self.critic_grad_clip = 10.0

        self.actor = Actor(obs_dim, action_dim, max_action).to(device)
        self.qf1 = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf2 = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf1_target = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf2_target = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf1_target.load_state_dict(self.qf1.state_dict())
        self.qf2_target.load_state_dict(self.qf2.state_dict())

        actor_lr = args.learning_rate
        critic_lr = args.learning_rate * 2.0
        alpha_lr = args.learning_rate * 0.5
        self.actor_optimizer = optim.Adam(self.actor.parameters(), lr=actor_lr, eps=1e-5)
        self.q_optimizer = optim.Adam(
            list(self.qf1.parameters()) + list(self.qf2.parameters()), lr=critic_lr, eps=1e-5
        )

        target_entropy = max(1.0, 0.5 * action_dim)
        self.target_entropy = -target_entropy
        init_alpha = 0.15 if action_dim <= 2 else (0.10 if action_dim >= 8 else 0.08)
        self.log_alpha = torch.tensor(np.log(init_alpha), device=device, requires_grad=True)
        self.alpha_optimizer = optim.Adam([self.log_alpha], lr=alpha_lr, eps=1e-5)
        self.alpha = float(self.log_alpha.exp().item())

        self.exploration_noise = args.exploration_noise * (1.5 if action_dim >= 6 else 1.0)
        self.exploration_noise_final = self.exploration_noise * 0.35
        self.obs_mean = torch.zeros(obs_dim, device=device)
        self.obs_var = torch.ones(obs_dim, device=device)
        self.obs_count = 1e-4
        self._sync_obs_stats()

    def _sync_obs_stats(self):
        for net in [self.actor, self.qf1, self.qf2, self.qf1_target, self.qf2_target]:
            net.obs_mean.copy_(self.obs_mean)
            net.obs_var.copy_(self.obs_var)

    @torch.no_grad()
    def _update_obs_stats(self, obs, next_obs):
        x = torch.cat([obs, next_obs], dim=0)
        batch_mean = x.mean(dim=0)
        batch_var = x.var(dim=0, unbiased=False)
        batch_count = float(x.shape[0])

        delta = batch_mean - self.obs_mean
        total = self.obs_count + batch_count
        new_mean = self.obs_mean + delta * (batch_count / total)
        m_a = self.obs_var * self.obs_count
        m_b = batch_var * batch_count
        m2 = m_a + m_b + delta.pow(2) * self.obs_count * batch_count / total
        new_var = (m2 / total).clamp_min(1e-6)

        self.obs_mean.copy_(new_mean)
        self.obs_var.copy_(new_var)
        self.obs_count = total
        self._sync_obs_stats()

    def select_action(self, obs):
        self.action_it += 1
        obs_t = torch.tensor(obs.reshape(1, -1), device=self.device, dtype=torch.float32)
        with torch.no_grad():
            action = self.actor(obs_t).cpu().numpy().flatten()
        frac = min(1.0, self.action_it / 250000.0)
        noise_scale = self.max_action * (
            self.exploration_noise * (1.0 - frac) + self.exploration_noise_final * frac
        )
        noise = np.random.normal(0.0, noise_scale, size=action.shape)
        return np.clip(action + noise, -self.max_action, self.max_action)

    def update(self, batch):
        self.total_it += 1
        obs, next_obs, actions, rewards, dones = batch
        rewards = rewards.view(-1)
        dones = dones.view(-1)

        self._update_obs_stats(obs, next_obs)

        alpha = self.log_alpha.exp().clamp(1e-4, 1.0)
        with torch.no_grad():
            next_actions, next_log_pi, _ = self.actor.sample(next_obs)
            q1_next = self.qf1_target(next_obs, next_actions).view(-1)
            q2_next = self.qf2_target(next_obs, next_actions).view(-1)
            min_q_next = torch.min(q1_next, q2_next) - alpha * next_log_pi.view(-1)
            td_target = rewards + (1.0 - dones) * self.gamma * min_q_next

        q1 = self.qf1(obs, actions).view(-1)
        q2 = self.qf2(obs, actions).view(-1)
        critic_loss = F.mse_loss(q1, td_target) + F.mse_loss(q2, td_target)

        self.q_optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
        critic_loss.backward()
        torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(
            list(self.qf1.parameters()) + list(self.qf2.parameters()), self.critic_grad_clip
        )
        self.q_optimizer.step()

        actor_loss_val = 0.0
        alpha_loss_val = 0.0
        if self.total_it % self.policy_frequency == 0:
            pi, log_pi, _ = self.actor.sample(obs)
            q1_pi = self.qf1(obs, pi).view(-1)
            q2_pi = self.qf2(obs, pi).view(-1)
            actor_loss = (alpha.detach() * log_pi.view(-1) - torch.min(q1_pi, q2_pi)).mean()

            self.actor_optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
            actor_loss.backward()
            torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(self.actor.parameters(), self.actor_grad_clip)
            self.actor_optimizer.step()
            actor_loss_val = actor_loss.item()

            alpha_loss = -(self.log_alpha.exp() * (log_pi.view(-1).detach() + self.target_entropy)).mean()
            self.alpha_optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)
            alpha_loss.backward()
            self.alpha_optimizer.step()
            self.alpha = float(self.log_alpha.exp().clamp(1e-4, 1.0).item())
            alpha_loss_val = alpha_loss.item()

        soft_update(self.qf1_target, self.qf1, self.tau)
        soft_update(self.qf2_target, self.qf2, self.tau)

        return {
            "critic_loss": critic_loss.item(),
            "actor_loss": actor_loss_val,
            "alpha": self.alpha,
            "alpha_loss": alpha_loss_val,
        }

LOG_STD_MAX = 2
LOG_STD_MIN = -5


class Actor(nn.Module):
    """Stochastic Tanh-Gaussian actor with deterministic evaluation."""

    def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_action):
        super().__init__()
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear(obs_dim, 256)
        self.fc2 = nn.Linear(256, 256)
        self.fc_mean = nn.Linear(256, action_dim)
        self.fc_logstd = nn.Linear(256, action_dim)
        self.register_buffer("action_scale", torch.tensor(max_action, dtype=torch.float32))

    def forward(self, obs):
        x = F.relu(self.fc1(obs))
        x = F.relu(self.fc2(x))
        mean = self.fc_mean(x)
        log_std = torch.tanh(self.fc_logstd(x))
        log_std = LOG_STD_MIN + 0.5 * (LOG_STD_MAX - LOG_STD_MIN) * (log_std + 1)
        return mean, log_std

    def sample(self, obs):
        mean, log_std = self(obs)
        std = log_std.exp()
        normal = torch.distributions.Normal(mean, std)
        x_t = normal.rsample()
        y_t = torch.tanh(x_t)
        action = y_t * self.action_scale
        log_prob = normal.log_prob(x_t)
        log_prob -= torch.log(self.action_scale * (1 - y_t.pow(2)) + 1e-6)
        log_prob = log_prob.sum(1, keepdim=True)
        mean_action = torch.tanh(mean) * self.action_scale
        return action, log_prob, mean_action

    @torch.no_grad()
    def get_action(self, obs):
        mean, _ = self(obs)
        return torch.tanh(mean) * self.action_scale


class QNetwork(nn.Module):
    """Q-function Q(s, a) -> scalar."""

    def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim):
        super().__init__()
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear(obs_dim + action_dim, 256)
        self.fc2 = nn.Linear(256, 256)
        self.fc3 = nn.Linear(256, 1)

    def forward(self, obs, action):
        x = torch.cat([obs, action], dim=-1)
        x = F.relu(self.fc1(x))
        x = F.relu(self.fc2(x))
        return self.fc3(x)


class OffPolicyAlgorithm:
    """Soft-Clipped Uncertainty-Aware SAC.

    Core contributions:
    1) soft-clipped double-Q backup: interpolate between min and max critics to reduce
       min-induced underestimation without reverting to over-optimistic averaging;
    2) two-sample target value estimation to lower target variance;
    3) disagreement-aware actor objective that penalizes actions with large critic mismatch.
    """

    def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_action, device, args):
        self.device = device
        self.max_action = max_action
        self.gamma = args.gamma
        self.tau = args.tau
        self.policy_frequency = args.policy_frequency
        self.total_it = 0

        self.clip_mix = 0.75
        self.actor_uncertainty_coef = 0.15
        self.critic_consistency_coef = 0.01

        self.actor = Actor(obs_dim, action_dim, max_action).to(device)

        self.qf1 = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf2 = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf1_target = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf2_target = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf1_target.load_state_dict(self.qf1.state_dict())
        self.qf2_target.load_state_dict(self.qf2.state_dict())

        self.actor_optimizer = optim.Adam(self.actor.parameters(), lr=args.learning_rate)
        self.q_optimizer = optim.Adam(
            list(self.qf1.parameters()) + list(self.qf2.parameters()),
            lr=args.learning_rate,
        )

        self.target_entropy = -action_dim
        self.log_alpha = torch.zeros(1, requires_grad=True, device=device)
        self.alpha = self.log_alpha.exp().item()
        self.alpha_optimizer = optim.Adam([self.log_alpha], lr=args.learning_rate)

    def _soft_clipped_q(self, q1, q2):
        q_min = torch.min(q1, q2)
        q_max = torch.max(q1, q2)
        return self.clip_mix * q_min + (1.0 - self.clip_mix) * q_max

    def select_action(self, obs):
        obs_t = torch.tensor(obs.reshape(1, -1), device=self.device, dtype=torch.float32)
        with torch.no_grad():
            action, _, _ = self.actor.sample(obs_t)
        return action.cpu().numpy().flatten()

    def update(self, batch):
        self.total_it += 1
        obs, next_obs, actions, rewards, dones = batch

        with torch.no_grad():
            next_actions1, next_log_pi1, _ = self.actor.sample(next_obs)
            next_actions2, next_log_pi2, _ = self.actor.sample(next_obs)

            q1_next_1 = self.qf1_target(next_obs, next_actions1).view(-1)
            q2_next_1 = self.qf2_target(next_obs, next_actions1).view(-1)
            q1_next_2 = self.qf1_target(next_obs, next_actions2).view(-1)
            q2_next_2 = self.qf2_target(next_obs, next_actions2).view(-1)

            next_v1 = self._soft_clipped_q(q1_next_1, q2_next_1) - self.alpha * next_log_pi1.view(-1)
            next_v2 = self._soft_clipped_q(q1_next_2, q2_next_2) - self.alpha * next_log_pi2.view(-1)
            next_v = 0.5 * (next_v1 + next_v2)
            td_target = rewards + (1 - dones) * self.gamma * next_v

        q1 = self.qf1(obs, actions).view(-1)
        q2 = self.qf2(obs, actions).view(-1)
        critic_loss = (
            F.smooth_l1_loss(q1, td_target)
            + F.smooth_l1_loss(q2, td_target)
            + self.critic_consistency_coef * (q1 - q2).pow(2).mean()
        )

        self.q_optimizer.zero_grad()
        critic_loss.backward()
        self.q_optimizer.step()

        actor_loss_val = 0.0
        alpha_val = self.alpha
        q_gap_val = (q1 - q2).abs().mean().item()
        if self.total_it % self.policy_frequency == 0:
            pi, log_pi, _ = self.actor.sample(obs)
            q1_pi = self.qf1(obs, pi).view(-1)
            q2_pi = self.qf2(obs, pi).view(-1)
            q_gap_pi = (q1_pi - q2_pi).abs()
            q_actor = self._soft_clipped_q(q1_pi, q2_pi) - self.actor_uncertainty_coef * q_gap_pi
            actor_loss = (self.alpha * log_pi.view(-1) - q_actor).mean()

            self.actor_optimizer.zero_grad()
            actor_loss.backward()
            self.actor_optimizer.step()
            actor_loss_val = actor_loss.item()

            alpha_loss = (-self.log_alpha.exp() * (log_pi.detach().view(-1) + self.target_entropy)).mean()
            self.alpha_optimizer.zero_grad()
            alpha_loss.backward()
            self.alpha_optimizer.step()
            self.alpha = self.log_alpha.exp().item()
            alpha_val = self.alpha

        soft_update(self.qf1_target, self.qf1, self.tau)
        soft_update(self.qf2_target, self.qf2, self.tau)

        return {
            "critic_loss": critic_loss.item(),
            "actor_loss": actor_loss_val,
            "alpha": alpha_val,
            "q_gap": q_gap_val,
        }

class OffPolicyAlgorithm:
    """Adaptive-Optimism Replay-Guided SAC.

    Contributions relative to vanilla SAC:
    1) uncertainty-adaptive actor optimism: the actor is optimized against a value target
       interpolating between min-Q and mean-Q, with optimism automatically reduced when
       the twin critics disagree;
    2) multi-sample soft value targets: average two next-action samples to reduce target
       variance without adding more networks;
    3) replay-guided advantage anchoring: a small, decaying AWR-style regression term pulls
       the policy mean toward replay actions only when critics estimate those actions to be
       better than the current policy action.
    """

    def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_action, device, args):
        self.device = device
        self.max_action = max_action
        self.gamma = args.gamma
        self.tau = args.tau
        self.policy_frequency = args.policy_frequency
        self.total_it = 0

        self.optimism_scale = 0.5
        self.entropy_gap_coef = 0.20
        self.critic_consistency_coef = 0.005
        self.adv_bc_coef = 0.05
        self.gap_ema = 1.0

        self.actor = Actor(obs_dim, action_dim, max_action).to(device)

        self.qf1 = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf2 = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf1_target = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf2_target = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.qf1_target.load_state_dict(self.qf1.state_dict())
        self.qf2_target.load_state_dict(self.qf2.state_dict())

        self.actor_optimizer = optim.Adam(self.actor.parameters(), lr=args.learning_rate)
        self.q_optimizer = optim.Adam(
            list(self.qf1.parameters()) + list(self.qf2.parameters()), lr=args.learning_rate
        )

        self.target_entropy = -action_dim
        self.log_alpha = torch.zeros(1, requires_grad=True, device=device)
        self.alpha = self.log_alpha.exp().item()
        self.alpha_optimizer = optim.Adam([self.log_alpha], lr=args.learning_rate)

    def _optimistic_q(self, q1, q2):
        q_min = torch.min(q1, q2)
        q_gap = (q1 - q2).abs()
        gap_norm = (q_gap / (self.gap_ema + 1e-6)).detach()
        trust = 1.0 / (1.0 + gap_norm)
        # optimism_scale=0.5 means the trusted limit is the twin-critic mean.
        return q_min + self.optimism_scale * trust * q_gap, q_gap, gap_norm

    def select_action(self, obs):
        obs_t = torch.tensor(obs.reshape(1, -1), device=self.device, dtype=torch.float32)
        with torch.no_grad():
            action, _, _ = self.actor.sample(obs_t)
        return action.cpu().numpy().flatten()

    def update(self, batch):
        self.total_it += 1
        obs, next_obs, actions, rewards, dones = batch

        with torch.no_grad():
            next_actions1, next_log_pi1, _ = self.actor.sample(next_obs)
            next_actions2, next_log_pi2, _ = self.actor.sample(next_obs)

            q1_next_1 = self.qf1_target(next_obs, next_actions1).view(-1)
            q2_next_1 = self.qf2_target(next_obs, next_actions1).view(-1)
            q1_next_2 = self.qf1_target(next_obs, next_actions2).view(-1)
            q2_next_2 = self.qf2_target(next_obs, next_actions2).view(-1)

            v_next_1 = torch.min(q1_next_1, q2_next_1) - self.alpha * next_log_pi1.view(-1)
            v_next_2 = torch.min(q1_next_2, q2_next_2) - self.alpha * next_log_pi2.view(-1)
            td_target = rewards + (1 - dones) * self.gamma * 0.5 * (v_next_1 + v_next_2)

        q1 = self.qf1(obs, actions).view(-1)
        q2 = self.qf2(obs, actions).view(-1)
        critic_loss = (
            F.mse_loss(q1, td_target)
            + F.mse_loss(q2, td_target)
            + self.critic_consistency_coef * (q1 - q2).pow(2).mean()
        )

        self.q_optimizer.zero_grad()
        critic_loss.backward()
        self.q_optimizer.step()

        q_gap_val = (q1 - q2).abs().mean().item()
        self.gap_ema = 0.995 * self.gap_ema + 0.005 * q_gap_val

        actor_loss_val = 0.0
        alpha_val = self.alpha
        bc_loss_val = 0.0
        if self.total_it % self.policy_frequency == 0:
            pi, log_pi, mean_pi = self.actor.sample(obs)
            q1_pi = self.qf1(obs, pi).view(-1)
            q2_pi = self.qf2(obs, pi).view(-1)
            q_actor, q_gap_pi, gap_norm = self._optimistic_q(q1_pi, q2_pi)
            alpha_eff = self.alpha * (1.0 + self.entropy_gap_coef * torch.clamp(gap_norm, 0.0, 3.0))
            actor_loss_rl = (alpha_eff * log_pi.view(-1) - q_actor).mean()

            with torch.no_grad():
                q1_data = self.qf1(obs, actions).view(-1)
                q2_data = self.qf2(obs, actions).view(-1)
                q_data = torch.min(q1_data, q2_data)
                adv = q_data - q_actor.detach()
                adv_scale = adv.abs().mean() + 1e-6
                weights = torch.exp(torch.clamp(adv / adv_scale, min=0.0, max=5.0)) - 1.0

            bc_err = ((mean_pi - actions) / self.max_action).pow(2).mean(dim=1)
            bc_loss = (weights * bc_err).sum() / (weights.sum() + 1e-6)
            bc_coef = self.adv_bc_coef / np.sqrt(1.0 + self.total_it / 50000.0)
            actor_loss = actor_loss_rl + bc_coef * bc_loss

            self.actor_optimizer.zero_grad()
            actor_loss.backward()
            self.actor_optimizer.step()
            actor_loss_val = actor_loss.item()
            bc_loss_val = bc_loss.item()

            alpha_loss = (-self.log_alpha.exp() * (log_pi.detach().view(-1) + self.target_entropy)).mean()
            self.alpha_optimizer.zero_grad()
            alpha_loss.backward()
            self.alpha_optimizer.step()
            self.alpha = self.log_alpha.exp().item()
            alpha_val = self.alpha

        soft_update(self.qf1_target, self.qf1, self.tau)
        soft_update(self.qf2_target, self.qf2, self.tau)

        return {
            "critic_loss": critic_loss.item(),
            "actor_loss": actor_loss_val,
            "bc_loss": bc_loss_val,
            "alpha": alpha_val,
            "q_gap": q_gap_val,
        }

   153  LOG_STD_MAX = 2
   154  LOG_STD_MIN = -5
   155  
   156  
   157  class Actor(nn.Module):
   158      """Stochastic Tanh-Gaussian actor with deterministic evaluation."""
   159  
   160      def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_action):
   161          super().__init__()
   162          self.fc1 = nn.Linear(obs_dim, 256)
   163          self.fc2 = nn.Linear(256, 256)
   164          self.fc_mean = nn.Linear(256, action_dim)
   165          self.fc_logstd = nn.Linear(256, action_dim)
   166          self.register_buffer("action_scale", torch.tensor(max_action, dtype=torch.float32))
   167  
   168      def forward(self, obs):
   169          x = F.relu(self.fc1(obs))
   170          x = F.relu(self.fc2(x))
   171          mean = self.fc_mean(x)
   172          log_std = torch.tanh(self.fc_logstd(x))
   173          log_std = LOG_STD_MIN + 0.5 * (LOG_STD_MAX - LOG_STD_MIN) * (log_std + 1)
   174          return mean, log_std
   175  
   176      def sample(self, obs):
   177          mean, log_std = self(obs)
   178          std = log_std.exp()
   179          normal = torch.distributions.Normal(mean, std)
   180          x_t = normal.rsample()
   181          y_t = torch.tanh(x_t)
   182          action = y_t * self.action_scale
   183          log_prob = normal.log_prob(x_t)
   184          log_prob -= torch.log(self.action_scale * (1 - y_t.pow(2)) + 1e-6)
   185          log_prob = log_prob.sum(1, keepdim=True)
   186          mean_action = torch.tanh(mean) * self.action_scale
   187          return action, log_prob, mean_action
   188  
   189      @torch.no_grad()
   190      def get_action(self, obs):
   191          mean, _ = self(obs)
   192          return torch.tanh(mean) * self.action_scale
   193  
   194  
   195  class QNetwork(nn.Module):
   196      """Q-function Q(s, a) -> scalar."""
   197  
   198      def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim):
   199          super().__init__()
   200          self.fc1 = nn.Linear(obs_dim + action_dim, 256)
   201          self.fc2 = nn.Linear(256, 256)
   202          self.fc3 = nn.Linear(256, 1)
   203  
   204      def forward(self, obs, action):
   205          x = torch.cat([obs, action], dim=-1)
   206          x = F.relu(self.fc1(x))
   207          x = F.relu(self.fc2(x))
   208          return self.fc3(x)
   209  
   210  
   211  class OffPolicyAlgorithm:
   212      """Adaptive-Optimism Replay-Guided SAC.
   213  
   214      Contributions relative to vanilla SAC:
   215      1) uncertainty-adaptive actor optimism: the actor is optimized against a value target
   216         interpolating between min-Q and mean-Q, with optimism automatically reduced when
   217         the twin critics disagree;
   218      2) multi-sample soft value targets: average two next-action samples to reduce target
   219         variance without adding more networks;
   220      3) replay-guided advantage anchoring: a small, decaying AWR-style regression term pulls
   221         the policy mean toward replay actions only when critics estimate those actions to be
   222         better than the current policy action.
   223      """
   224  
   225      def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_action, device, args):
   226          self.device = device
   227          self.max_action = max_action
   228          self.gamma = args.gamma
   229          self.tau = args.tau
   230          self.policy_frequency = args.policy_frequency
   231          self.total_it = 0
   232  
   233          self.optimism_scale = 0.5
   234          self.entropy_gap_coef = 0.20
   235          self.critic_consistency_coef = 0.005
   236          self.adv_bc_coef = 0.05
   237          self.gap_ema = 1.0
   238  
   239          self.actor = Actor(obs_dim, action_dim, max_action).to(device)
   240  
   241          self.qf1 = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
   242          self.qf2 = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
   243          self.qf1_target = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
   244          self.qf2_target = QNetwork(obs_dim, action_dim).to(device)
   245          self.qf1_target.load_state_dict(self.qf1.state_dict())
   246          self.qf2_target.load_state_dict(self.qf2.state_dict())
   247  
   248          self.actor_optimizer = optim.Adam(self.actor.parameters(), lr=args.learning_rate)
   249          self.q_optimizer = optim.Adam(
   250              list(self.qf1.parameters()) + list(self.qf2.parameters()), lr=args.learning_rate
   251          )
   252  
   253          self.target_entropy = -action_dim
   254          self.log_alpha = torch.zeros(1, requires_grad=True, device=device)
   255          self.alpha = self.log_alpha.exp().item()
   256          self.alpha_optimizer = optim.Adam([self.log_alpha], lr=args.learning_rate)
   257  
   258      def _optimistic_q(self, q1, q2):
   259          q_min = torch.min(q1, q2)
   260          q_gap = (q1 - q2).abs()
   261          gap_norm = (q_gap / (self.gap_ema + 1e-6)).detach()
   262          trust = 1.0 / (1.0 + gap_norm)
   263          # optimism_scale=0.5 means the trusted limit is the twin-critic mean.
   264          return q_min + self.optimism_scale * trust * q_gap, q_gap, gap_norm
   265  
   266      def select_action(self, obs):
   267          obs_t = torch.tensor(obs.reshape(1, -1), device=self.device, dtype=torch.float32)
   268          with torch.no_grad():
   269              action, _, _ = self.actor.sample(obs_t)
   270          return action.cpu().numpy().flatten()
   271  
   272      def update(self, batch):
   273          self.total_it += 1
   274          obs, next_obs, actions, rewards, dones = batch
   275  
   276          with torch.no_grad():
   277              next_actions1, next_log_pi1, _ = self.actor.sample(next_obs)
   278              next_actions2, next_log_pi2, _ = self.actor.sample(next_obs)
   279  
   280              q1_next_1 = self.qf1_target(next_obs, next_actions1).view(-1)
   281              q2_next_1 = self.qf2_target(next_obs, next_actions1).view(-1)
   282              q1_next_2 = self.qf1_target(next_obs, next_actions2).view(-1)
   283              q2_next_2 = self.qf2_target(next_obs, next_actions2).view(-1)
   284  
   285              v_next_1 = torch.min(q1_next_1, q2_next_1) - self.alpha * next_log_pi1.view(-1)
   286              v_next_2 = torch.min(q1_next_2, q2_next_2) - self.alpha * next_log_pi2.view(-1)
   287              td_target = rewards + (1 - dones) * self.gamma * 0.5 * (v_next_1 + v_next_2)
   288  
   289          q1 = self.qf1(obs, actions).view(-1)
   290          q2 = self.qf2(obs, actions).view(-1)
   291          critic_loss = (
   292              F.mse_loss(q1, td_target)
   293              + F.mse_loss(q2, td_target)
   294              + self.critic_consistency_coef * (q1 - q2).pow(2).mean()
   295          )
   296  
   297          self.q_optimizer.zero_grad()
   298          critic_loss.backward()
   299          self.q_optimizer.step()
   300  
   301          q_gap_val = (q1 - q2).abs().mean().item()
   302          self.gap_ema = 0.995 * self.gap_ema + 0.005 * q_gap_val
   303  
   304          actor_loss_val = 0.0
   305          alpha_val = self.alpha
   306          bc_loss_val = 0.0
   307          if self.total_it % self.policy_frequency == 0:
   308              pi, log_pi, mean_pi = self.actor.sample(obs)
   309              q1_pi = self.qf1(obs, pi).view(-1)
   310              q2_pi = self.qf2(obs, pi).view(-1)
   311              q_actor, q_gap_pi, gap_norm = self._optimistic_q(q1_pi, q2_pi)
   312              alpha_eff = self.alpha * (1.0 + self.entropy_gap_coef * torch.clamp(gap_norm, 0.0, 3.0))
   313              actor_loss_rl = (alpha_eff * log_pi.view(-1) - q_actor).mean()
   314  
   315              with torch.no_grad():
   316                  q1_data = self.qf1(obs, actions).view(-1)
   317                  q2_data = self.qf2(obs, actions).view(-1)
   318                  q_data = torch.min(q1_data, q2_data)
   319                  adv = q_data - q_actor.detach()
   320                  adv_scale = adv.abs().mean() + 1e-6
   321                  weights = torch.exp(torch.clamp(adv / adv_scale, min=0.0, max=5.0)) - 1.0
   322  
   323              bc_err = ((mean_pi - actions) / self.max_action).pow(2).mean(dim=1)
   324              bc_loss = (weights * bc_err).sum() / (weights.sum() + 1e-6)
   325              bc_coef = self.adv_bc_coef / np.sqrt(1.0 + self.total_it / 50000.0)
   326              actor_loss = actor_loss_rl + bc_coef * bc_loss
   327  
   328              self.actor_optimizer.zero_grad()
   329              actor_loss.backward()
   330              self.actor_optimizer.step()
   331              actor_loss_val = actor_loss.item()
   332              bc_loss_val = bc_loss.item()
   333  
   334              alpha_loss = (-self.log_alpha.exp() * (log_pi.detach().view(-1) + self.target_entropy)).mean()
   335              self.alpha_optimizer.zero_grad()
   336              alpha_loss.backward()
   337              self.alpha_optimizer.step()
   338              self.alpha = self.log_alpha.exp().item()
   339              alpha_val = self.alpha
   340  
   341          soft_update(self.qf1_target, self.qf1, self.tau)
   342          soft_update(self.qf2_target, self.qf2, self.tau)
   343  
   344          return {
   345              "critic_loss": critic_loss.item(),
   346              "actor_loss": actor_loss_val,
   347              "bc_loss": bc_loss_val,
   348              "alpha": alpha_val,
   349              "

# Task: rl-offpolicy-continuous

# Online RL: Off-Policy Actor-Critic for Continuous Control


## Objective
Design and implement an off-policy actor-critic RL algorithm for continuous control. Your code goes in `custom_offpolicy_continuous.py`. Three reference implementations (DDPG, TD3, SAC) are provided as read-only.

## Background
Off-policy methods maintain a replay buffer of past experience and update the policy using data collected under previous policies. Key challenges include overestimation bias in Q-value estimates, exploration-exploitation tradeoff, and sample efficiency. Different approaches address these through twin critics, entropy regularization, target smoothing, or delayed updates.

## Constraints
- Network architecture dimensions are FIXED and cannot be modified
- Total parameter count is enforced at runtime
- Focus on algorithmic innovation: new loss functions, update rules, exploration strategies, etc.
- Do NOT simply copy a reference implementation with minor changes

## Evaluation
Trained and evaluated on HalfCheetah-v4, Hopper-v4, Walker2d-v4. Additional held-out environments (not shown during intermediate testing) are used to assess generalization. Metric: mean episodic return over 10 evaluation episodes (higher is better).

```python
   291:                 if info is not None:
   292:                     print(f"global_step={global_step}, episodic_return={info['episode']['r']}")
   293:                     break
   294: 
   295:         # Handle truncation
   296:         real_next_obs = next_obs.copy()
   297:         for idx, trunc in enumerate(truncations):
   298:             if trunc:
   299:                 real_next_obs[idx] = infos["final_observation"][idx]
   300: 
   301:         rb.add(obs[0], real_next_obs[0], actions[0], rewards[0], terminations[0])
   302:         obs = next_obs
   303: 
   304:         # Training
   305:         if global_step > args.learning_starts:
   306:             batch = rb.sample(args.batch_size, device)
   307:             log_dict = algorithm.update(batch)
   308: 
   309:             if global_step % 1000 == 0:
   310:                 metrics_str = " ".join(
   311:                     f"{k}={v:.4f}" if isinstance(v, float) else f"{k}={v}"
   312:                     for k, v in log_dict.items()
   313:                 )
   314:                 print(f"TRAIN_METRICS step={global_step} {metrics_str}", flush=True)
   315: 
   316:         # Evaluation
   317:         if (global_step + 1) % args.eval_freq == 0:
   318:             eval_returns = eval_actor(
   319:                 args.env_id, algorithm.actor, device,
   320:                 n_episodes=args.eval_episodes, seed=args.seed + 1000,
   321:             )
   322:             mean_return = eval_returns.mean()
   323:             print(f"Eval episodic_return: {mean_return:.2f}", flush=True)
   324: 
   325:     envs.close()
```

```python
    75: class SimpleReplayBuffer:
    76:     """Numpy-based replay buffer for continuous actions."""
    77: 
    78:     def __init__(self, obs_dim, action_dim, max_size=int(1e6)):

    88:     def add(self, obs, next_obs, action, reward, done):

    90:         self.next_obs[self.ptr] = next_obs

   115: 
   116: def _mlp_factory(input_dim, output_dim, hidden=256):
```
